description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a classic wooden stock and a long, blued steel barrel. The stock features a smooth, dark wood finish with a metal buttplate and a sling attachment point. The receiver and bolt assembly are robust, with a prominent bolt handle and an integrated rear iron sight. The barrel is slender and extends to a simple front post sight, with no visible muzzle device attached. The rifle appears to have an internal magazine, as there is no detachable box magazine visible. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century military rifles, combining wood and metal for durability and reliability.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a dark wooden stock, long steel barrel, and iron sights, featuring a robust and traditional design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, bolt assembly, and long barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow profile of the barrel and the front sight post.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, bolt handle, and the length of the barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
